message:
test(conformance): HELLO-shadow metamorphic + fixture goldens for XDEL/XRANGE/EVAL

crates/fr-conformance/src/lib.rs (+121)
  * New `fr_p2c_004_f_metamorphic_shadowed_hello_options_preserve_effective_state`
    test: asserts that a HELLO command with two AUTH+SETNAME pairs
    (second pair shadows first) produces an *effective* reply
    identical to the simpler HELLO that only issues the second pair.
    Compares 13 of the 14 reply-array fields element-for-element
    between baseline and transformed runtimes (idx 7 is the
    server-generated client ID, which is reply-local and allowed to
    differ). Closes the gap in the HELLO shadowing semantics
    landed in the runtime/command commit.
  * Additional metamorphic cases added for XDEL-on-missing,
    XRANGE/XREVRANGE COUNT=0 nil-array parity, and the
    scripting NOSCRIPT error path.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs
  * New smoke cases (+100) driving the metamorphic relations above
    against a live vendored Redis oracle so the golden reply shapes
    are tied to an actual upstream Redis 7 server — not just
    FrankenRedis's runtime.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_client.json (+110)
  * Adds Redis-7 "wrong number of arguments for '<cmd>' command"
    goldens for the CLIENT subcommand family now that
    `wrong_arity_error()` in fr-runtime emits the exact string.
  * Adds HELLO shadow-option cases exercising the new effective-
    state semantics.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_scripting.json
  * Updates expected errors for EVAL / EVALSHA / FUNCTION cases
    that previously expected a generic ERR; the NOSCRIPT / "not
    allowed from script" strings are now pinned to their exact
    Redis-7 form.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_stream.json
  * XDEL-on-missing-key expectation: Integer(0) (was a stream-not-
    found error in one prior case).
  * XRANGE / XREVRANGE COUNT=0 expectations updated to nil-array
    (`Array(None)` / `"kind":"nil-array"` on the wire) matching
    Redis 7.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_transaction.json
  * Updated MULTI / EXEC / DISCARD cases where an unknown command
    inside the block triggers EXECABORT — now carry the
    args_preview-enriched CommandError::UnknownCommand golden reply
    instead of the prior generic ERR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 struct VendoredRedisOracle {
     child: Child,
     port: u16,
@@ -1052,8 +1134,13 @@ fn core_scripting_live_redis_matches_runtime() {

         "mismatches: {:?}",
